claim_card.claim: AI intuition is defined operationally as the rapid, action-relevant stabilization of interpretation or response through sensitivity to evolving gradients in a system’s context, prior to full explicit reasoning.
claim_card.test_hook: Compare systems that act only after full symbolic reconstruction with systems allowed to orient earlier via gradient-sensitive probe selection; measure timing, continuity, and error under uncertainty.

source.locator: p1 Abstract; p2 Introduction; p6 Conclusion
